top_signals: Israel kills Ali Larijani — Iran's de facto leader and top security official — overnight strike near Tehran
Israel kills Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani in same operation
Israel launches simultaneous 'extensive strikes' on Tehran AND Beirut
Drone hits hotel inside Baghdad's Green Zone — Iran-backed militia escalation in Iraq
1,000+ ships blocked at Strait of Hormuz — ~20% of global oil supply disrupted
US NCTC director Joe Kent resigns over Iran war, says it posed 'no imminent threat'
Trump scolds allies for refusing Hormuz coalition — zero military commitments from Europe
Iran fires cluster munitions at central Israel — first confirmed use on Israeli territory
Israel issues new evacuation warnings for southern Lebanon residents
Iran's power structure decimated — Khamenei killed at war start, now Larijani eliminated

new: china: china_reduced_flights removed (was -3, flights now normal)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 08:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all primary theaters. Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. No ceasefire in ANY theater. Only minor signal: UAE reopens airspace. Oil exports down 60%.

latest_news.headline: Large explosions in northern Tehran near Saadabad Palace — strikes across central Tehran, Karaj, Shahriar, Shiraz, Arak
latest_news.text: Large explosions reported near Saadabad Palace complex in northern Tehran. Follows earlier strikes on central Tehran, Karaj, Shahriar, Shiraz, Arak. War entering Day 18.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,444 — 18,551 injured since Feb 28
latest_news.text: At least 1,444 killed and 18,551 injured by US-Israeli attacks on Iran since Feb 28. Amnesty confirms US attack on Minab primary school killed 170+, mostly schoolgirls.

latest_news.headline: Qatar intercepts 13 of 14 Iranian ballistic missiles — Bahrain neutralizes 129 missiles, 221 drones
latest_news.text: Qatar intercepts 13 of 14 ballistic missiles from Iran. Bahrain reports 129 missiles and 221 drones neutralized since war began. Saudi intercepts 12 drones in Eastern region.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah attacks Nahariya, Israel — shrapnel falls on Jerusalem holy sites (Al-Aqsa, Holy Sepulchre)
latest_news.text: Hezbollah launches attack on northern Israeli city of Nahariya, one wounded. Missile and interceptor fragments found at holy sites in Jerusalem Old City near Al-Aqsa Mosque and Church of the Holy Sepulchre.

latest_news.headline: Iran President Pezeshkian: Iran will not surrender to 'bullies' — asserts right to self-defense
latest_news.text: Iranian President Pezeshkian defends Tehran's right to self-defence, says Iran did not start the war and will not surrender. Hardening rhetoric after Larijani assassination.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 18, 17:04 UTC) — Day 18 of Iran war. Tehran under sustained bombardment (Saadabad Palace struck). 1,444+ killed in Iran. Amnesty confirms US strike killed 170+ at Minab school. Hezbollah fires on Nahariya; shrapnel at Jerusalem holy sites. Qatar intercepts 13/14 missiles. Kuwait arrests Hezbollah cell. Trump pressures UK/France on Hormuz. Pezeshkian: 'will not surrender'. UAE reopens airspace. Oil still ~$100/bbl. No ceasefire in any theater.
